output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(MIN(?duration) AS ?shortest) WHERE {
  ?competition wdt:P31 wd:Q2852059 ; wdt:P154 wd:Q583215 ; wdt:P154 wd:Q174333 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1977") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1978") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2008") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2009"))
  ?competition wdt:P527 ?game .
  ?game wdt:P1049 ?duration .
}
LIMIT 1
output.answer: No data found in Wikidata for the duration of games between the Los Angeles Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies in the specified NLCS years (1977, 1978, 2008, 2009). The duration property (P1049) for these games appears to be unpopulated in Wikidata.
output.formatted:
No data found in Wikidata for the duration of games between the Los Angeles Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies in the specified NLCS years (1977, 1978, 2008, 2009). The duration property (P1049) for these games appears to be unpopulated in Wikidata.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(MIN(?duration) AS ?shortest) WHERE {
  ?competition wdt:P31 wd:Q2852059 ; wdt:P154 wd:Q583215 ; wdt:P154 wd:Q174333 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1977") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1978") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2008") || STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2009"))
  ?competition wdt:P527 ?game .
  ?game wdt:P1049 ?duration .
}
LIMIT 1
```

Got 1 row and 1 column:
| shortest |
| -------- |
